untranslatable_reason: Core signal logic requires detecting official statements and comparing them to subsequent data releases—this is event-based external data (Fed announcements, economic data calendars) that cannot be expressed using only price/technical indicators. The contradiction magnitude threshold and official statement detection require external data sources and NLP/event parsing not available in the technical indicator set. Position sizing escalation multiplier and conviction mechanics also require external state management beyond indicator-based rules.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy: Used elevated volume (vol_ratio_20) and volatility (hvol_20 > 0.20) as proxies for the elevated volatility preceding market dislocations. Exit conditions use modest return threshold (2%) and ADX decline to signal reversal of trending conviction. However, this is a severely degraded translation—the signal fundamentally requires event detection (official statements + data contradictions) which cannot be replicated with technical indicators alone. A proper implementation would need: (1) event calendar integration, (2) sentiment/NLP parsing of official statements, (3) economic data surprise indexing, and (4) external data validation layer.
